1.description: get Finnmark fylke geometry and fylkesnummer

2.description: get all municipalities with geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: select municipalities that intersect Finnmark fylke geometry

5.description: reduce 200-year flood polygons to Finnmark extent by intersecting with fylke geometry

6.description: get buildings in Finnmark municipalities (filtered by kommunenummer list from step 3)

7.description: find buildings that intersect reduced 200-year flood polygons

8.description: count buildings per municipality (kommunenummer, kommunenavn) in Finnmark that intersect 200-year flood zones

9.description: sort municipalities by building count descending
